creator: bsduck@mailo.com
text:
Hello,

The maintainer email of LXQt components is set to lxqt@freebsd.org.

Unfortunately, this email address seems not to exist or at least not to work properly, because bugs filed against these ports don't get assigned to the LXQt ports team but just to "freebsd-ports-bugs (Nobody)".

Trying to add this address to the CC list results in the following error:
---
Bugzilla was unable to make any match at all for one or more of the names and/or email addresses you entered on the previous page.

Please go back and try other names or email addresses.

CC: 	lxqt@freebsd.org did not match anything
---

See for example these two currently open bugs:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280267
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280217
